calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Irving Pfeffer, Clerk: Felicia Green, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Daniel M. Bornstein, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Legal One Realty, and also representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Toby Nelson is present.
Attorney, Martha Millar representing the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 486 Hayes Street, San Francisco, California.

This case settled, the trial date of JUL-27-2009 is vacated.
